{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output identifies LaneRouter as a novel approach but doesn't compare it to specific prior work in learned routing beyond stating it outperforms two baselines.",
    "R1.7": "The output mentions the use of GPT-4 for quality labeling but doesn't discuss any other citations or potential missing works related to cost-aware NLP serving or routing.",
    "RX.1": "The output explicitly flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of the results and acknowledges limitations in the evaluation.",
    "RX.3": "The output accurately describes the scope of the benchmark and its focus on knowledge/reasoning tasks, but it could benefit from a more detailed description of the data used.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not identify any potential regressions or harmful patterns introduced by LaneRouter.",
    "RX.5": "The output mentions the use of GPT-4 as a judge and candidate model but lacks details about the provenance of other models, threshold tuning data, and the custom QA slice."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output identifies LaneRouter as a novel approach but doesn't compare it to specific prior work in learned routing beyond stating it outperforms two baselines.
rationale.R1.7: The output mentions the use of GPT-4 for quality labeling but doesn't discuss any other citations or potential missing works related to cost-aware NLP serving or routing.
rationale.RX.1: The output explicitly flags uncertainty regarding the generalizability of the results and acknowledges limitations in the evaluation.
rationale.RX.3: The output accurately describes the scope of the benchmark and its focus on knowledge/reasoning tasks, but it could benefit from a more detailed description of the data used.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not identify any potential regressions or harmful patterns introduced by LaneRouter.
rationale.RX.5: The output mentions the use of GPT-4 as a judge and candidate model but lacks details about the provenance of other models, threshold tuning data, and the custom QA slice.
